summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, instant close and low-signal closeout are disabled, and fix/merge/raise-pr actions are blocked. The only security-sensitive hydrated item is #53550 and is routed separately without poisoning unrelated PR classification.
